svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="u3gImKyn70SM0qtDXO0k" name="第 1 页"> <mxGraphModel dx="1535" dy="1119" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.arrows2.arrow;dy=0.6;dx=40;notch=0;fillColor=#6c8ebf;strokeColor=none;" value="Client Request" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="50" x="20" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="TokenBlacklist
Filter" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="100" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;align=center;" value="Order -100" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="80" x="120" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;" target="6" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="TokenBinding
Filter" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="270" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;align=center;" value="Order -95" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="80" x="290" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" edge="1" parent="1" source="6" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;" target="9" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="LoginAttempt
Filter" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="440" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;align=center;" value="Order -90" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="80" x="460" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" edge="1" parent="1" source="9" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;" target="12" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="XssProtection
Filter" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="610" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;align=center;" value="Order -80" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="80" x="630" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" edge="1" parent="1" source="12" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;" target="15" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="SecurityHeaders
Filter" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="780" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" parent="1" style="text;fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;align=center;" value="Order -70" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="80" x="800" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" edge="1" parent="1" source="15" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;" target="18" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="18" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="RequestRate

100" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="80" x="1310" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="26" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.arrows2.arrow;dy=0.6;dx=40;notch=0;fillColor=#6c8ebf;strokeColor=none;rotation=180;" value="Backend Service" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="50" x="1440" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="27" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=3;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;arcSize=8;" value="安全检查层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="830" x="90" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="28" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=3;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;arcSize=8;" value="限流层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="150" x="940" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="29" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=3;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;arcSize=8;" value="路由层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="320" x="1110" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.arrows2.arrow;dy=0.6;dx=30;notch=0;fillColor=#b85450;strokeColor=none;rotation=90;" value="拦截 → 401/403" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="30" x="350" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.arrows2.arrow;dy=0.6;dx=30;notch=0;fillColor=#d6b656;strokeColor=none;rotation=90;" value="429 Too Many Requests" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="30" x="990" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="32" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" target="30" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="165" y="285" /> <mxPoint x="365" y="285" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="33" edge="1" parent="1" source="18" style="endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" target="31" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1015" y="285" /> <mxPoint x="1005" y="285" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
